project.name: supernode
project.note: Multi-repo project. lumera provides chain types/protos. supernode (this) consumes them for metrics reporting and state handling.

feature_status.name: STORAGE_FULL State in SDK Adapter
feature_status.notes: SUPERNODE_STATE_STORAGE_FULL is implemented in the SDK adapter and ParseSupernodeState handling. Worktree still has local changes and the test file exists but is not tracked yet.

feature_status.name: Cascade Kademlia DB Bytes Metric
feature_status.notes: collectMetrics reads statusResp.P2PMetrics.Database.P2PDbSizeMb and converts it to bytes with nil-safe handling. Worktree still has local changes.

feature_status.name: Verifier STORAGE_FULL Allowance
feature_status.notes: checkSupernodeState allows STORAGE_FULL with warning alongside POSTPONED. Worktree still has local changes and the test file exists but is not tracked yet.

feature_status.name: Lumera Proto Dependency Update
feature_status.notes: go.mod still has a local replace directive for github.com/LumeraProtocol/lumera => ../lumera. This is acceptable for local development but must be replaced with a tagged release before merge.

handoff.stopped_at: Workspace push refreshed 2026-04-09. lumera S10-S15 closed. Everlight consolidated into x/supernode. STORAGE_FULL trigger changed to disk_usage_percent > max_storage_usage_percent.
handoff.next_immediate: Finish SN-1 implementation, validate tests, then replace the local lumera dependency with the tagged lumera release.
watch_out: go.mod still has a local replace directive for lumera — CI will fail until this is switched to a tagged release.
IAT01 and IAT02 remain part of the cross-repo gate after SN-1 is complete.
STORAGE_FULL is triggered by disk_usage_percent > max_storage_usage_percent (existing param), NOT by cascade_kademlia_db_bytes. cascade_kademlia_db_max_bytes was removed from lumera proto.

CRITICAL: STORAGE_FULL SNs keep receiving Everlight payouts for held data (proportional to cascade_kademlia_db_bytes). POSTPONED SNs do NOT. This is the core economic reason STORAGE_FULL exists as a separate state.
cascade_kademlia_db_bytes is still reported and used for Everlight payout weighting.
Everlight protos live under proto/lumera/supernode/v1/ — no standalone proto/lumera/everlight/ path.
RewardDistribution at proto field 19 of supernode Params.

next_slice.goal: SuperNode recognizes STORAGE_FULL state, reports cascade_kademlia_db_bytes, allows STORAGE_FULL startup

recent_decisions: 2026-04-06: Everlight supernode slice is SN-1 (not S20). Supernode uses its own ID namespace.
2026-04-06: cascade_kademlia_db_bytes derived from P2P DB size in MB * 1024 * 1024.
2026-04-06: STORAGE_FULL treated same as POSTPONED in verifier — warning, not error.
2026-04-06: Local replace directive for lumera dep during active Everlight development.
2026-04-07: Cross-sync push refreshed repo context from workspace state. Branch is everlight at 76314c6 and SN-1 remains in progress.

2026-04-09: Workspace push — lumera S10-S15 closed. STORAGE_FULL trigger is disk_usage_percent > max_storage_usage_percent (not cascade_kademlia_db_bytes). cascade_kademlia_db_max_bytes fully removed from lumera proto. RewardDistribution at field 19.

2026-04-09: STORAGE_FULL SNs are eligible for Everlight storage rewards (distribution.go pays ACTIVE + STORAGE_FULL). POSTPONED SNs are NOT eligible. Verifier warnings updated to reflect this distinction.
blockers: go.mod has local replace directive for lumera — CI will fail until switched to tagged release
IAT01 blocked until lumera publishes a tagged Everlight release and the local replace directive is removed
IAT02 blocked until SN-1 implementation and tests are complete

discrepancies.description: go.mod still points github.com/LumeraProtocol/lumera to ../lumera for local development.
discrepancies.proposed_fix: Replace the local dependency with a tagged lumera release before merge.
